docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE BANK OF CALIFORNIA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT HUNNICUTT, MICHAEL EDWARD DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-24-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-26-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-04-1996

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO STAY PROCEEDINGS BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY #2; AND NOTICE OF DEFENDANT'S CHAPTER 13 BANKRUPTCY FILING, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE BANK OF CALIFORNIA, N.A.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-24-1996, CONTINUED TO OCT-24-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT: PLAINTIFF TO FILE A DECLARATION STATING CURRENT STATUS OF DEFT'S BANKRUPTCY CASE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-24-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-24-1996, AND FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE A BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT. IF PLAINTIFF CONTENDS THAT THIS COURT HAS NO JURISDICTION TO REQUIRE A BANKRUPTCY STATUS REPORT, PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE POINTS AND AUTHORITIES ON THE ISSUE NOT LATER THAN 11/20/96. HEARING SET FOR NOV-25-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
